pi_items.source: Code analysis: examples/sumo_env/scripts/setup_sumo.sh which creates this directory and populates it with host data.
Code analysis: examples/sumo_env/tasks/simulate_signal_power_outage/setup_task.sh which explicitly creates and clears this directory, and export_result.sh checks for files here.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real-world Bologna Pasubio traffic simulation scenario (originally developed in the iTETRIS project). The scenario files are staged at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio. The agent's generated configurations, simulation outputs, and final resilience report must be saved to /home/ga/SUMO_Output.
